title: About Us | Brown Immigration Law
content:
## Bringing families together, making businesses stronger
Brown Immigration Law is dedicated to fostering growth and creating lasting impacts for individuals and families pursuing brighter futures. With five offices and a global reach, our firm provides experienced counsel in all areas of immigration law.
At Brown Immigration Law, our team understands that immigration can be challenging. Our experienced immigration attorneys are committed to finding the best solutions tailored to your unique circumstances.
When you put us in charge of your immigration case, we can:
- Check eligibility so you can understand whether your immigration goals are possible.
so you can understand whether your immigration goals are possible.
- Gather documents that you will need, such as various visa, I-9, and EB forms.
that you will need, such as various visa, I-9, and EB forms.
- Complete paperwork for you so you can feel confident that every form is done right.
for you so you can feel confident that every form is done right.

## When You Work With Us, You’ll Benefit From
- Over 10 Decades of Combined Experience in Immigration Law
- Attentive and Responsive Legal Care
- A Team Dedicated to Securing Your Future

The attorney, Kelly Sanchez, was very professional and knowledgeable and my case manager, Fatima Fernandes, was very diligent and organized. They were both very accessible and helpful when I had any questions. My immigration interview ended up being waived but if yours isn't, the attorney will go to the interview with you, which is great. Would definitely recommend.
